description: Wave 66 deferred candidate. Edgelord, sober and laconic: BT4-057 Saonel is canonically a Universe 6 Tournament of Power participant per its own already-applied Trivia ('Saonel is a Namekian from Universe 6 who, alongside partner Pilina, absorbed most of their universe's Namekian population before the Tournament of Power'). The card carries characters: [namekian] only. Extending to characters: [namekian, universe-6-tournament-cohort] is the dual-pointer pattern parallel to Cabba's [saiyan, universe-6-tournament-cohort] precedent — race-level plus within-arc-cohort. Note: the wave-66 prompt premised a 'Saonel + Pirina' pair but only BT4-057 exists in corpus (Pirina has no separate print; she is co-referenced on Saonel's card only). Single-card dual-pointer move is still clean. Pushes U6 cohort 9 -> 10 anchors. The corresponding namekian node's related_characters now includes universe-6-tournament-cohort mirror.
citations: [bt4-057-namekian-duo-saonel.md Trivia section: Universe 6 + Tournament of Power canon]
[universe-6-tournament-cohort.md Caveats: 'Universe 6 Namekians dual-pointer pattern (future)' — now activated]
other_candidates_considered: Pirina solo print — does not exist in corpus, only co-referenced on Saonel card

BT4-053 Nail re-point to U6 cohort — REFUSED, Nail is canonically Universe 7 Frieza-Saga Namekian, NOT U6; the wave-66 prompt's pairing of BT4-053+BT4-057 was an error and would have miscategorized Nail
Vegeta solo extension — wave 66 already attached Vegeta to 4 anchors; no fresh unwired Vegeta prints surfaced in this wave's scope
Trunks solo extension — wave 66 already attached BT1-039; the other Trunks prints listed in trunks.md appears_on are all already attached
